utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section is fully specified: (1) property includes address, neighborhood, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, layout, amenities, fees, taxes, and notes on workspace potential; (2) financing includes price, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, amortization, monthly payment, and borrowers; (3) legal_services includes provider, services, and estimated cost; (4) moving_services includes provider, scope, and cost; (5) setup_services includes utilities breakdown and initial setup fees; (6) total_budget includes cost breakdown with all key items and total outlay. All items are present and detailed.
